payload.title: SPEC.md + README: make 'two languages with one name' framing explicit
payload.description: The Activation section in SPEC.md mentions the cargo-mode caveat but treats it as a footnote. README still calls the cargo-mode subset 'Rustricted' without qualification. Either rewrite both to make the split a first-class concept, OR rename rustricted_attrs::strict!{} to lints!{} to signal the lint-only scope by name.
